description: Fix frontend inconsistencies: implement the settings layout redesign (remove narrow max-w constraints from all 19 tenant settings pages, add proper sub-navigation). Also fix the superadmin settings page width. Follow the SETTINGS_LAYOUT_REDESIGN.md specification exactly.
steps: Read the existing app/tenant/settings/layout.tsx and components/tenant/settings/settings-nav.tsx to understand current structure
Update app/tenant/settings/layout.tsx to use full width with proper padding (p-6 lg:p-8), no max-w constraint, and ensure the SettingsNav is displayed properly
Read and update app/tenant/settings/profile/page.tsx - remove max-w-2xl, use responsive grid layout
Read and update app/tenant/settings/security/page.tsx - remove max-w-2xl, use two-column grid for password/2FA
Read and update app/tenant/settings/general/page.tsx - remove max-w-2xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/sessions/page.tsx - remove max-w-2xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/telegram/page.tsx - remove max-w-2xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/email/page.tsx - remove max-w-2xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/api-keys/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/backup/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/billing/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/integrations/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/pipelines/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/portal/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/webhooks/page.tsx - remove max-w-3xl
Read and update app/tenant/settings/roles/page.tsx - remove max-w-4xl
Read and update app/superadmin/settings/page.tsx - change max-w-3xl to max-w-6xl or remove constraint
Ensure all pages compile without TypeScript errors
acceptance_criteria: No settings page uses max-w-2xl or max-w-3xl constraints
Settings layout provides full-width content area
Superadmin settings uses at least max-w-6xl
All pages compile without TypeScript errors
verification: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep 'error TS' | wc -l should output 0
grep -r 'max-w-2xl\|max-w-3xl' app/tenant/settings/ should return no results
findings: The actual page.tsx files for most tenant settings pages already had no max-w constraints. The constraints existed only in 4 loading.tsx files (billing, general, roles, team) with max-w-2xl, and in industry-templates/page.tsx paragraph with max-w-2xl. All removed. The superadmin settings page already used max-w-6xl meeting the requirement. npm run build fails with JWT_SECRET env var missing - this is a pre-existing issue unrelated to this feature (confirmed by testing without changes).
